star_threshold.description: Global minimum star threshold applied to all queries

min_star_threshold.description: Absolute minimum star threshold - never go below this

max_star_threshold.description: Absolute maximum star threshold - never exceed this

noise_keywords.description: Keywords in repo name/description that indicate noise

language_filters.description: Languages considered non-code and filtered out

spam_name_patterns.description: Regex patterns matched against the repo name to filter star-farmed spam (date/version-suffixed names, cracked-software bait). Keep high-precision so legitimate names like llama-3 are not caught.

dead_repo_forks_ratio.description: Repo considered dead if forks > stars * this ratio

dead_repo_min_stars.description: Minimum stars for a repo to not be considered dead by fork ratio alone

consecutive_noise_high_days.description: Number of consecutive high-noise runs before increasing threshold

consecutive_signal_good_days.description: Number of consecutive good-signal runs before decreasing threshold

consecutive_signal_low_days.description: Number of consecutive low-signal runs before aggressive threshold increase

noise_high_threshold_pct.description: Noise percentage above which is considered 'high'

noise_low_threshold_pct.description: Noise percentage below which is considered 'low'

signal_high_threshold_pct.description: Signal percentage above which is considered 'high'

signal_low_threshold_pct.description: Signal percentage below which is considered 'low'

star_adjust_step.description: Amount to adjust star threshold up or down during tuning
